business_angle: Greens Precise Plumbing & Heating ltd: heating and plumbing with tidy finishes
distinctive_phrases: Have used several plumbers in the past, with varying success
Some were expensive, some were unreliable - it was always hit and miss
First Class service from the Greens Plumbing team
Responsive service, easy to book and kept me updated re time of arrival so I didn’t have to wait in all day
Payment over invoice was also a breeze

strongest_review_quote.text: Have used several plumbers in the past, with varying success. Some were expensive, some were unreliable - it was always hit and miss. Thought I'd give Greens Precise Plumbing a shot as I needed a new toilet and hand basin plumbed in. Callum was great, he explained the requirements for the job, provided an excellent quote and crucially delivered on the agreed costs and timescale. Highly recommended for being reliable, honest and professional - they even cleaned up after themselves!! Great job Cal
strongest_review_quote.author: Chris

claims_to_avoid: Supplier names as job locations in captions
pitch_hook_summary: Lead with review detail about tidy finishes (Chris)
